title: Your Newest Competitor Isn't a Developer
subtitle: 27% of AI repos created in 2026 sustain 300+ commits per month. New GitHub accounts, first repos ever, absurd velocity. Here's what's happening — and what it means for the developer tools market.
author: Graham Rowe
meta_description: Domain experts are arriving on GitHub via AI coding agents. 27% of new AI repos in 2026 sustain 300+ commits/month from single-owner accounts. Data-driven analysis of the domain expert builder phenomenon.
